results.rendered_html:
śivā
1 N. of Pārvatī.
2 A jackal (in general); jahāsi nidrāmaśivaiḥ śivārutaiḥ  Ki. 1. 38 ; hareradya dvāre śiva śiva śivānāṃ kalakalaḥ  Bv. 1. 32 ;  R. 7. 50 , 11. 61 , 12. 39. 
3 A fortunate woman.
4 Final beatitude.
5 The Śamī tree.
6 The yellow myrobalan.
7 Dūrvā grass.
8 A kind of yellow pigment.
9 Turmeric.
Comp.
— arātiḥ a dog
— priyaḥ a goat.
— phalā the Śamī tree.
— rutaṃ the howling of a jackal
